title: Tetramolopium alinae
taxonomy: Tetramolopium alinae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Tetramolopium and is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant is an endemic species, found only in the wild in its native habitat. Its classification is further divided into the family, genus, and species levels, providing a detailed understanding of its place within the plant kingdom. Tetramolopium alinae is a rare and unique plant, adding to its classification as a distinct species.
